summary: Bill due reminders and a sanitized sample CSV for imports.

introduced: Bill due reminders at 7, 3, and 1 day before plus on the due date
Bill reminder settings in Notifications with a configurable daily time
Tap a bill notification to open the Bills workspace
changed: Bundled sample CSV now uses fictional demo data instead of personal bill details
Dock badge for bills and chat uses top and bottom corners when both are present
